Helper to make a state-changing request with CSRF token.\n */\nasync function requestWithCsrf(\n  app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>,\n  path: string,\n  options: RequestInit = {}\n): Promise<Response> },\n119\t};\n120\t\n121\tconst TEST_COMPLEXES: ComplexIndex = {\n122\t  \"725-726\": {\n123\t    complexId: \"725-726\",\n124\t    name: \"Times Sq-42 St / Port Authority\",\n125\t    stations: [\"725\", \"726\"],\n126\t    allLines: [\"1\", \"2\", \"3\", \"7\", \"N\", \"Q\", \"R\", \"W\", \"S\", \"A\", \"C\", \"E\"],\n127\t    allStopIds: [\"725N\", \"725S\", \"726N\", \"726S\"],\n128\t  },\n129\t};\n130\t\n131\tconst TEST_TRANSFERS: Record<string, TransferConnection[]> = {\n132\t  \"725\": [{ toStationId: \"726\", toLines: [\"A\", \"C\", \"E\"], walkingSeconds: 120, accessible: true }],\n133\t};\n134\t\n135\t/**\n136\t * Helper to get a CSRF token from the test app.\n137\t */\n138\tasync function getCsrfToken(app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>): Promise<string> {\n139\t  const res = await app.request(\"/api/csrf-token\");\n140\t  expect(res.status).toBe(200);\n141\t  const body = await res.json();\n142\t  return body.token as string;\n143\t}\n144\t\n145\t/**\n146\t * Helper to make a state-changing request with CSRF token.\n147\t */\n148\tasync function requestWithCsrf(\n149\t  app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>,\n150\t  path: string,\n151\t  options: RequestInit = {}\n152\t): Promise<Response> {\n153\t  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n154\t  return app.request(path, {\n155\t    ...options,\n156\t    headers: {\n157\t      ...options.headers,\n158\t      \"X-CSRF-Token\": token,\n159\t    },\n160\t  });\n161\t}\n162\t\n163\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n164\t// Tests\n165\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n166\t\n167\tdescribe(\"Data Flow Integration Tests\", () => {\n168\t  let db: Database.Database;\n169\t  let app: ComplexIndex = {};\nconst TEST_TRANSFERS: Record<string, TransferConnection[]> = {};\n\n/**\n * Helper to get a CSRF token from the test app.\n */\nasync function getCsrfToken(app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>): Promise<string> {\n  const res = await app.request(\"/api/csrf-token\");\n  expect(res.status).toBe(200);\n  const body = await res.json();\n  return body.token as string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Helper to make a state-changing request with CSRF token.\n */\nasync function requestWithCsrf(\n  app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>,\n  path: string,\n  options: RequestInit = {}\n): Promise<Response> {\n  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n  return app.request(path, {\n    ...options,\n    headers: {\n      ...options.headers,\n      \"X-CSRF-Token\": token,\n    },\n  });\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Tests\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe(\"Concurrency and Race Conditions Integration Tests\", () => {\n  let db: Database.Database;\n  let app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>;\n  let authHeaders: { Authorization: string };\n  let adminAuthHeaders: { Authorization: string };\n\n  beforeEach(async () => {\n    db = createIntegrationTestDatabase();\n    initTripTracking(db, TEST_STATIONS);\n\n    const userCreds = await createTestUserCredentials();\n    const });\n\n  describe(\"Concurrent trip creation\", () => {\n    it(\"handles multiple simultaneous trip creation requests\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const tripCount = 20;\n\n      // Create trips concurrently\n      const promises = Array.from({ length: tripCount }, (_, i) =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n            departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000 - i * 10000) / 1000),\n            arrivalTime: Math.floor((now - i * 10000) / 1000),\n            notes: `Concurrent trip ${i}`,\n          }),\n        })\n 15000);\n\n    it(\"assigns unique IDs to all concurrent trips\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const tripCount = 10;\n\n      const promises = Array.from({ length: tripCount }, () =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n            departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n            arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n          }),\n        })\n      );\n\n      const responses = await Promise.all(promises);\n\n      // Extract all trip IDs\n      const tripIds = new Set<string>();\n      for (const res of responses) {\n        if (res.status === 201) {\n          const body = await res.json();\n          tripIds.add(body.trip.id);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // All IDs should be unique\n Helper to make a state-changing request with CSRF token.\n */\nasync function requestWithCsrf(\n  app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>,\n  path: string,\n  options: RequestInit = {}\n): Promise<Response> {\n  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n  return app.request(path, {\n    ...options,\n    headers: {\n      ...options.headers,\n      \"X-CSRF-Token\": token,\n    },\n  });\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Tests\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe(\"Concurrency and Race Conditions Integration Tests\", () => {\n  let db: Database.Database;\n  let app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>;\n  let authHeaders: { Authorization: string };\n  let adminAuthHeaders: { Authorization: string };\n\n  beforeEach(async () => {\n    db = createIntegrationTestDatabase();\n    initTripTracking(db, TEST_STATIONS);\n\n    const userCreds = await createTestUserCredentials();\n    const });\n\n  describe(\"Concurrent trip creation\", () => {\n    it(\"handles multiple simultaneous trip creation requests\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const tripCount = 10;\n\n      // Create trips concurrently with conservative limit for SQLite stability\n      const promises = Array.from({ length: tripCount }, (_, i) =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n promises = Array.from({ length: tripCount }, () =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n            departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n            arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n          }),\n        })\n      );\n\n      const responses = await Promise.all(promises);\n\n      // Extract all trip IDs\n      const tripIds = new Set<string>();\n      for (const res of responses) {\n        if (res.status === 201) {\n          const body = await res.json();\n          tripIds.add(body.trip.id);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // All IDs should be unique\n      expect(tripIds.size).toBe(tripCount);\n    });\n\n    it(\"maintains data consistency under concurrent writes\", async () => {\n      const now = headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n })\n      );\n\n      await Promise.all(promises);\n\n      // Verify database consistency\n      const trips = getTrips({ limit: 1000 });\n      expect(trips.length).toBe(tripCount);\n\n      // Each });\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Concurrent updates to same resource\", () => {\n    it(\"handles simultaneous updates to trip notes\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create a trip\n      const createRes = await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          origin: \"101\",\n          destination: \"725\",\n          line: \"1\",\n          departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n          arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n          notes: \"Original\",\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const createBody = await createRes.json();\n      const tripId = createBody.trip.id;\n\n      // Simultaneous updates\n      const updateCount = 10;\n      const promises = Array.from({ length: updateCount }, (_, i) =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, `/api/trips/${tripId}/notes`, {\n          method: \"PATCH\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({ notes: `Update ${i}` }),\n        })\n      );\n\n      const responses = await Promise.all(promises);\n\n      // At least one should succeed\n      const successCount = responses.filter((r) => r.status === 200).length;\n      expect(successCount).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(1);\n\n      // Final state should be consistent\n      const trip = getTripById(tripId);\n      expect(trip).toBeDefined();\n      expect(trip?.notes).toMatch(/Update \\d+/);\n    }, 15000);\n\n    it(\"handles concurrent read and write operations\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create a trip\n      const createRes = await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          origin: \"101\",\n          destination: \"725\",\n          line: \"1\",\n          departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n          arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const createBody = await createRes.json();\n      const tripId = createBody.trip.id;\n\n      // Mix of reads and writes\n      const operations = [];\n      for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {\n        if (i % 2 === 0) {\n          // Read - include auth headers for ownership check\n          operations.push(\n            app\n              .request(`/api/trips/${tripId}`, { headers: authHeaders })\n              .then((r) => ({ type: \"read\", status: r.status }))\n          );\n        } else {\n          // Write\n          operations.push(\n            requestWithCsrf(app, `/api/trips/${tripId}/notes`, {\n              method: \"PATCH\",\n              headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n              body: JSON.stringify({ notes: `Note ${i}` }),\n            }).then((r) => ({ type: \"write\", status: r.status }))\n          );\n        }\n      }\n\n      const results = await Promise.all(operations);\n\n      // All reads should succeed (or return 404 if trip was deleted during test)\n      const reads = results.filter((r) => r.type === \"read\");\n      expect(reads.every((r) => r.status === 200 || r.status === 404)).toBe(true);\n    });\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Concurrent deletions\", () => {\n    it(\"handles multiple deletion requests gracefully\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create multiple trips\n      const tripIds: string[] = [];\n      for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {\n        const createRes = await = await res.json();\n  return body.token as string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Helper to make a state-changing request with CSRF token.\n */\nasync function requestWithCsrf(\n  app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>,\n  path: string,\n  options: RequestInit = {}\n): Promise<Response> {\n  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n  return app.request(path, {\n    ...options,\n    headers: {\n      ...options.headers,\n      \"X-CSRF-Token\": token,\n    },\n  });\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Tests\n// test app.\n */\nasync function getCsrfToken(app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>): Promise<string> {\n  const res = await app.request(\"/api/csrf-token\");\n  expect(res.status).toBe(200);\n  const body = await res.json();\n  return body.token as string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Helper to make a state-changing request with CSRF token.\n */\nasync function requestWithCsrf(\n  app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>,\n  path: string,\n  options: RequestInit = {}\n): Promise<Response> {\n  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n  return app.request(path, {\n    ...options,\n    headers: {\n      ...options.headers,\n      \"X-CSRF-Token\": token,\n    },\n  });\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Tests\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe(\"Concurrency and Race Conditions Integration Tests\", () => {\n  let db: Database.Database;\n  let app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>;\n  let authHeaders: { Authorization: string };\n  let adminAuthHeaders: { Authorization: string };\n\n  beforeEach(async () => {\n    db = TEST_ROUTES,\n      TEST_COMPLEXES,\n      TEST_TRANSFERS,\n      \"/nonexistent/dist\"\n    );\n  });\n\n  afterEach(() => {\n    closeDatabase(db);\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Concurrent trip creation\", () => {\n    it(\"handles multiple simultaneous trip creation requests\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const tripCount = 10;\n\n      // Create trips concurrently with conservative limit for SQLite stability\n      const promises = Array.from({ length: tripCount }, (_, i) =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n from the test app.\n */\nasync function getCsrfToken(app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>): Promise<string> {\n  const res = await app.request(\"/api/csrf-token\");\n  expect(res.status).toBe(200);\n  const body = await res.json();\n  return body.token as string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Helper to make a state-changing request with CSRF token.\n */\nasync function requestWithCsrf(\n  app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>,\n  path: string,\n  options: RequestInit = {}\n): Promise<Response> {\n  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n  return app.request(path, {\n    ...options,\n    headers: {\n      ...options.headers,\n      \"X-CSRF-Token\": token,\n    },\n  });\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Tests\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe(\"Concurrency and Race Conditions Integration Tests\", () => {\n  let db: Database.Database;\n  let app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>;\n  let authHeaders: { Authorization: string };\n  let adminAuthHeaders: { Authorization: string };\n\n  beforeEach(async () => {\n    db = createIntegrationTestDatabase();\n    initTripTracking(db, TEST_STATIONS);\n\n    const userCreds = await createTestUserCredentials();\n    const adminCreds = await createTestAdminCredentials();\n    authHeaders = { Authorization: userCreds.authorizationHeader };\n    adminAuthHeaders = { Authorization: adminCreds.authorizationHeader };\n\n    app = createApp(\n      TEST_STATIONS,\n () => {\n    it(\"handles multiple simultaneous trip creation requests\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const tripCount = 10;\n\n      // Create trips concurrently with conservative limit for SQLite stability\n      const promises = Array.from({ length: tripCount }, (_, i) =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n })\n      );\n\n      const responses = await Promise.all(promises);\n\n      // All should succeed\n      const successCount = responses.filter((r) => r.status === 201).length;\n      expect(successCount).toBe(tripCount);\n\n      // Verify all trips were created in database\n      const trips = getTrips({ limit: 1000 });\n      expect(trips.length).toBe(tripCount);\n    }, 30000);\n\n    it(\"assigns unique IDs to all concurrent trips\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const tripCount = 10;\n\n      const promises = Array.from({ length: tripCount }, () =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n            departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n            arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n          }),\n        })\n      );\n\n      const responses = await Promise.all(promises);\n\n      // Extract all trip IDs\n      const tripIds = new Set<string>();\n      for (const res of responses) {\n        if (res.status === 201) {\n          const body = await res.json();\n          tripIds.add(body.trip.id);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // All IDs should be unique\n      expect(tripIds.size).toBe(tripCount);\n    });\n\n    it(\"maintains data consistency under concurrent writes\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const tripCount = 10;\n\n      // Create trips sequentially to ensure SQLite stability and deterministic ordering\n      const tripIds: string[] = [];\n      for (let i = 0; i < tripCount; i++) {\n        const res = await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n            departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000 - i * 60000) / 1000),\n            arrivalTime: Math.floor((now - i * 60000) / 1000),\n            actualDurationMinutes: 60,\n          }),\n        });\n        const body = await res.json();\n        if (body.trip) {\n          tripIds.push(body.trip.id);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Verify database consistency\n      const trips = getTrips({ limit: 1000 });\n      expect(trips.length).toBe(tripCount);\n\n      // Each trip should have all required fields\n      for (const trip of trips) {\n        expect(trip.id).toBeDefined();\n        expect(trip.origin).toBeDefined();\n        expect(trip.destination).toBeDefined();\n        expect(trip.line).toBeDefined();\n        expect(trip.departureTime).toBeDefined();\n        expect(trip.arrivalTime).toBeDefined();\n      }\n\n      // Verify all IDs are unique\n      expect(new Set(tripIds).size).toBe(tripCount);\n    });\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Concurrent updates to same resource\", () => {\n    it(\"handles simultaneous updates to trip notes\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create a trip\n      const createRes = await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          origin: \"101\",\n          destination: \"725\",\n          line: \"1\",\n          departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n          arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n          notes: \"Original\",\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const createBody = await createRes.json();\n      const tripId = createBody.trip.id;\n\n      // Simultaneous updates\n      const updateCount = 5;\n      const promises = Array.from({ length: updateCount }, (_, i) =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, `/api/trips/${tripId}/notes`, {\n          method: \"PATCH\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({ notes: `Update ${i}` }),\n        })\n      );\n\n      const responses = await Promise.all(promises);\n\n      // At least one should succeed\n      const successCount = responses.filter((r) => r.status === 200).length;\n      expect(successCount).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(1);\n\n      // Final state should be consistent\n      const trip = getTripById(tripId);\n      expect(trip).toBeDefined();\n      expect(trip?.notes).toMatch(/Update \\d+/);\n    }, 20000);\n\n    it(\"handles concurrent read and write operations\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create a trip\n      const createRes = await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          origin: \"101\",\n          destination: \"725\",\n          line: \"1\",\n          departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n          arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const createBody = await createRes.json();\n      const tripId = createBody.trip.id;\n\n      // Mix of reads and writes\n      const operations = [];\n      for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {\n        if (i % 2 === 0) {\n          // Read - include auth headers for ownership check\n          operations.push(\n            app\n              .request(`/api/trips/${tripId}`, { headers: authHeaders })\n              .then((r) => ({ type: \"read\", status: r.status }))\n          );\n        } else {\n          // Write\n          operations.push(\n            requestWithCsrf(app, `/api/trips/${tripId}/notes`, {\n              method: \"PATCH\",\n              headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n              body: JSON.stringify({ notes: `Note ${i}` }),\n            }).then((r) => ({ type: \"write\", status: r.status }))\n          );\n        }\n      }\n\n      const results = await Promise.all(operations);\n\n      // All reads should succeed (or return 404 if trip was deleted during test)\n      const reads = results.filter((r) => r.type === \"read\");\n      expect(reads.every((r) => r.status === 200 || r.status === 404)).toBe(true);\n    });\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Concurrent deletions\", () => {\n    it(\"handles multiple deletion requests gracefully\", ComplexIndex = {};\nconst TEST_TRANSFERS: Record<string, TransferConnection[]> = {};\n\n/**\n * Helper to get a CSRF token from the test app.\n */\nasync function getCsrfToken(app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>): Promise<string> {\n  const res = await app.request(\"/api/csrf-token\");\n  expect(res.status).toBe(200);\n  const body = await res.json();\n  return body.token as string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Helper to make a state-changing request with CSRF token.\n */\nasync function requestWithCsrf(\n  app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>,\n  path: string,\n  options: RequestInit = {}\n): Promise<Response> {\n  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n  return app.request(path, {\n    ...options,\n    headers: {\n      ...options.headers,\n      \"X-CSRF-Token\": token,\n    },\n  });\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Tests\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe(\"Concurrency and Race Conditions Integration Tests\", () => {\n  let db: Database.Database;\n  let app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>;\n  let authHeaders: { Authorization: string };\n  let adminAuthHeaders: { Authorization: string };\n\n  beforeEach(async () => {\n    db = createIntegrationTestDatabase();\n    initTripTracking(db, TEST_STATIONS);\n\n    const userCreds = await createTestUserCredentials();\n    const adminCreds = await createTestAdminCredentials();\n    authHeaders = { Authorization: userCreds.authorizationHeader };\n    adminAuthHeaders = { Authorization: adminCreds.authorizationHeader };\n\n    app = createApp(\n      TEST_STATIONS,\n      TEST_ROUTES,\n      TEST_COMPLEXES,\n      TEST_TRANSFERS,\n      \"/nonexistent/dist\"\n    );\n  });\n\n  afterEach(() => {\n    closeDatabase(db);\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Concurrent trip creation\", () => {\n    it(\"handles multiple simultaneous trip creation requests\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const tripCount = 10;\n\n    stops: [\"726\"],\n    isExpress: true,\n  },\n};\n\nconst TEST_COMPLEXES: ComplexIndex = {};\nconst TEST_TRANSFERS: Record<string, TransferConnection[]> = {};\n\n/**\n * Helper to get a CSRF token from the test app.\n */\nasync function getCsrfToken(app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>): Promise<string> {\n  const res = await app.request(\"/api/csrf-token\");\n  expect(res.status).toBe(200);\n  const body = await res.json();\n  return body.token as string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Helper to make a state-changing request with CSRF token.\n */\nasync function requestWithCsrf(\n  app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>,\n  path: string,\n  options: RequestInit = {}\n): Promise<Response> {\n  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n  return app.request(path, {\n    ...options,\n    headers: {\n      ...options.headers,\n      \"X-CSRF-Token\": token,\n    },\n  });\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Tests\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe(\"Concurrency and Race Conditions Integration Tests\", () => {\n  let db: Database.Database;\n  let app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>;\n  let authHeaders: { Authorization: string };\n  let adminAuthHeaders: { Authorization: string };\n\n  beforeEach(async () => {\n    db = createIntegrationTestDatabase();\n    initTripTracking(db, TEST_STATIONS);\n\n    const userCreds = await createTestUserCredentials();\n    const adminCreds = await createTestAdminCredentials();\n    authHeaders = { Authorization: userCreds.authorizationHeader };\n    adminAuthHeaders = { Authorization: adminCreds.authorizationHeader };\n\n    app = createApp(\n      TEST_STATIONS,\n      TEST_ROUTES,\n      TEST_COMPLEXES,\n      TEST_TRANSFERS,\n      \"/nonexistent/dist\"\n    );\n  });\n\n  afterEach(() => {\n    closeDatabase(db);\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Concurrent trip creation\", () => {\n    it(\"handles multiple simultaneous trip creation requests\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const tripCount = 10;\n\n      // Create trips concurrently with conservative limit for SQLite stability\n      const promises = Array.from({ length: tripCount }, (_, i) =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n })\n      );\n\n      const responses = await Promise.all(promises);\n\n      // All should succeed\n      const successCount = responses.filter((r) => r.status === 201).length;\n      expect(successCount).toBe(tripCount);\n\n      // Verify all trips were created in database\n      const trips = getTrips({ limit: 1000 });\n      expect(trips.length).toBe(tripCount);\n    }, 30000);\n\n    it(\"assigns unique IDs to all concurrent trips\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const tripCount = 10;\n\n      const promises = Array.from({ length: tripCount }, () =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n            departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n            arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n          }),\n        })\n      );\n\n      const responses = await Promise.all(promises);\n\n      // Extract all trip IDs\n      const tripIds = new Set<string>();\n      for (const res of responses) {\n        if (res.status === 201) {\n          const body = await res.json();\n          tripIds.add(body.trip.id);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // All IDs should be unique\n      expect(tripIds.size).toBe(tripCount);\n    });\n\n    it(\"maintains data consistency under concurrent writes\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const tripCount = 10;\n\n      // Create trips sequentially to ensure SQLite stability and deterministic ordering\n      const tripIds: string[] = [];\n      for (let i = 0; i < tripCount; i++) {\n        const res = await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n            departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000 - i * 60000) / 1000),\n            arrivalTime: Math.floor((now - i * 60000) / 1000),\n            actualDurationMinutes: 60,\n          }),\n        });\n        const body = await res.json();\n        if (body.trip) {\n          tripIds.push(body.trip.id);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Verify database consistency\n      const trips = getTrips({ limit: 1000 });\n      expect(trips.length).toBe(tripCount);\n\n      // Each trip should have all required fields\n      for (const trip of trips) {\n        expect(trip.id).toBeDefined();\n        expect(trip.origin).toBeDefined();\n        expect(trip.destination).toBeDefined();\n        expect(trip.line).toBeDefined();\n        expect(trip.departureTime).toBeDefined();\n        expect(trip.arrivalTime).toBeDefined();\n      }\n\n      // Verify all IDs are unique\n      expect(new Set(tripIds).size).toBe(tripCount);\n    });\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Concurrent updates to same resource\", () => {\n    it(\"handles simultaneous updates to trip notes\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create a trip\n      const createRes = await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          origin: \"101\",\n          destination: \"725\",\n          line: \"1\",\n          departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n          arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n          notes: \"Original\",\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const createBody = await createRes.json();\n      const tripId = createBody.trip.id;\n\n      // Simultaneous updates\n      const updateCount = 5;\n      const promises = Array.from({ length: updateCount }, (_, i) =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, `/api/trips/${tripId}/notes`, {\n          method: \"PATCH\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({ notes: `Update ${i}` }),\n        })\n      );\n\n      const responses = await Promise.all(promises);\n\n      // At least one should succeed\n      const successCount = responses.filter((r) => r.status === 200).length;\n      expect(successCount).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(1);\n\n      // Final state should be consistent\n      const trip = getTripById(tripId);\n      expect(trip).toBeDefined();\n      expect(trip?.notes).toMatch(/Update \\d+/);\n    }, 20000);\n\n    it(\"handles concurrent read and write operations\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create a trip\n      const createRes = await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          origin: \"101\",\n          destination: \"725\",\n          line: \"1\",\n          departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n          arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const createBody = await createRes.json();\n      const tripId = createBody.trip.id;\n\n      // Mix of reads and writes\n      const operations = [];\n      for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {\n        if (i % 2 === 0) {\n          // Read - include auth headers for ownership check\n          operations.push(\n            app\n              .request(`/api/trips/${tripId}`, { headers: authHeaders })\n              .then((r) => ({ type: \"read\", status: r.status }))\n          );\n        } else {\n          // Write\n          operations.push(\n            requestWithCsrf(app, `/api/trips/${tripId}/notes`, {\n              method: \"PATCH\",\n              headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n              body: JSON.stringify({ notes: `Note ${i}` }),\n            }).then((r) => ({ type: \"write\", status: r.status }))\n          );\n        }\n      }\n\n      const results = await Promise.all(operations);\n\n      // All reads should succeed (or return 404 if trip was deleted during test)\n      const reads = results.filter((r) => r.type === \"read\");\n      expect(reads.every((r) => r.status === 200 || r.status === 404)).toBe(true);\n    });\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Concurrent deletions\", () => {\n    it(\"handles multiple deletion requests gracefully\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create multiple trips\n      const tripIds: string[] = [];\n      for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {\n        const createRes = await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n            departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000 - i * 100000) / 1000),\n            arrivalTime: Math.floor((now - i * 100000) / 1000),\n          }),\n        });\n\n        const body = await createRes.json();\n        if (body.trip) {\n          tripIds.push(body.trip.id);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Delete all trips concurrently with conservative limit\n      const deletePromises = tripIds.map((id) =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, `/api/trips/${id}`, {\n          method: \"DELETE\",\n          headers: authHeaders,\n        })\n      );\n\n      const responses = await Promise.all(deletePromises);\n\n      // All should succeed\n      expect(responses.every((r) => r.status === 200)).toBe(true);\n\n      // Verify all are deleted\n      const trips = getTrips({ limit: 1000 });\n      expect(trips.length).toBe(0);\n    }, 20000);\n\n    it(\"prevents duplicate deletion of same resource\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create a trip\n      const createRes = await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          origin: \"101\",\n          destination: \"725\",\n          line: \"1\",\n          departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n          arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const createBody = await createRes.json();\n      const tripId = createBody.trip.id;\n\n      //    stops: [\"726\"],\n    isExpress: true,\n  },\n};\n\nconst TEST_COMPLEXES: ComplexIndex = {};\nconst TEST_TRANSFERS: Record<string, TransferConnection[]> = {};\n\n/**\n * Helper to get a CSRF token from the test app.\n */\nasync function getCsrfToken(app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>): Promise<string> {\n  const res = await app.request(\"/api/csrf-token\");\n  expect(res.status).toBe(200);\n  const body = await res.json();\n  return body.token as string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Helper to make a state-changing request with CSRF token.\n */\nasync function requestWithCsrf(\n  app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>,\n  path: string,\n  options: RequestInit = {}\n): Promise<Response> {\n  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n  return app.request(path, {\n    ...options,\n    headers: {\n      ...options.headers,\n      \"X-CSRF-Token\": token,\n    },\n  });\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Tests\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe(\"Concurrency and Race Conditions Integration Tests\", () => {\n  let db: Database.Database;\n  let app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>;\n  let authHeaders: { Authorization: string };\n  let adminAuthHeaders: { Authorization: string };\n\n  beforeEach(async () => {\n    db = createIntegrationTestDatabase();\n    initTripTracking(db, TEST_STATIONS);\n\n    const userCreds = await createTestUserCredentials();\n    const adminCreds = await createTestAdminCredentials();\n    authHeaders = { Authorization: userCreds.authorizationHeader };\n    adminAuthHeaders = { Authorization: adminCreds.authorizationHeader };\n\n    app = createApp(\n      TEST_STATIONS,\n () => {\n    it(\"handles multiple simultaneous trip creation requests\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const tripCount = 10;\n\n      // Create trips concurrently with conservative limit for SQLite stability\n      const promises = Array.from({ length: tripCount }, (_, i) =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n })\n      );\n\n      const responses = await Promise.all(promises);\n\n      // All should succeed\n      const successCount = responses.filter((r) => r.status === 201).length;\n      expect(successCount).toBe(tripCount);\n\n      // Verify all trips were created in database\n      const trips = getTrips({ limit: 1000 });\n      expect(trips.length).toBe(tripCount);\n    }, 30000);\n\n    it(\"assigns unique IDs to all concurrent trips\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const tripCount = 10;\n\n      const promises = Array.from({ length: tripCount }, () =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n            departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n            arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n          }),\n        })\n      );\n\n      const responses = await Promise.all(promises);\n\n      // Extract all trip IDs\n      const tripIds = new Set<string>();\n      for (const res of responses) {\n        if (res.status === 201) {\n          const body = await res.json();\n          tripIds.add(body.trip.id);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // All IDs should be unique\n      expect(tripIds.size).toBe(tripCount);\n    });\n\n    it(\"maintains data consistency under concurrent writes\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const tripCount = 10;\n\n      // Create trips sequentially to ensure SQLite stability and deterministic ordering\n      const tripIds: string[] = [];\n      for (let i = 0; i < tripCount; i++) {\n        const res = await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n            departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000 - i * 60000) / 1000),\n            arrivalTime: Math.floor((now - i * 60000) / 1000),\n            actualDurationMinutes: 60,\n          }),\n        });\n        const body = await res.json();\n        if (body.trip) {\n          tripIds.push(body.trip.id);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Verify database consistency\n      const trips = getTrips({ limit: 1000 });\n      expect(trips.length).toBe(tripCount);\n\n      // Each trip should have all required fields\n      for (const trip of trips) {\n        expect(trip.id).toBeDefined();\n        expect(trip.origin).toBeDefined();\n        expect(trip.destination).toBeDefined();\n        expect(trip.line).toBeDefined();\n        expect(trip.departureTime).toBeDefined();\n        expect(trip.arrivalTime).toBeDefined();\n      }\n\n      // Verify all IDs are unique\n      expect(new Set(tripIds).size).toBe(tripCount);\n    });\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Concurrent updates to same resource\", () => {\n    it(\"handles simultaneous updates to trip notes\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create a trip\n      const createRes = await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          origin: \"101\",\n          destination: \"725\",\n          line: \"1\",\n          departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n          arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n          notes: \"Original\",\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const createBody = await createRes.json();\n      const tripId = createBody.trip.id;\n\n      // Simultaneous updates\n      const updateCount = 5;\n      const promises = Array.from({ length: updateCount }, (_, i) =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, `/api/trips/${tripId}/notes`, {\n          method: \"PATCH\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({ notes: `Update ${i}` }),\n        })\n      );\n\n      const responses = await Promise.all(promises);\n\n      // At least one should succeed\n      const successCount = responses.filter((r) => r.status === 200).length;\n      expect(successCount).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(1);\n\n      // Final state should be consistent\n      const trip = getTripById(tripId);\n      expect(trip).toBeDefined();\n      expect(trip?.notes).toMatch(/Update \\d+/);\n    }, 20000);\n\n    it(\"handles concurrent read and write operations\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create a trip\n      const createRes = await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          origin: \"101\",\n          destination: \"725\",\n          line: \"1\",\n          departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n          arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const createBody = await createRes.json();\n      const tripId = createBody.trip.id;\n\n      // Mix of reads and writes\n      const operations = [];\n      for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {\n        if (i % 2 === 0) {\n          // Read - include auth headers for ownership check\n          operations.push(\n            app\n              .request(`/api/trips/${tripId}`, { headers: authHeaders })\n              .then((r) => ({ type: \"read\", status: r.status }))\n          );\n        } else {\n          // Write\n          operations.push(\n            requestWithCsrf(app, `/api/trips/${tripId}/notes`, {\n              method: \"PATCH\",\n              headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n              body: JSON.stringify({ notes: `Note ${i}` }),\n            }).then((r) => ({ type: \"write\", status: r.status }))\n          );\n        }\n      }\n\n      const results = await Promise.all(operations);\n\n      // All reads should succeed (or return 404 if trip was deleted during test)\n      const reads = results.filter((r) => r.type === \"read\");\n      expect(reads.every((r) => r.status === 200 || r.status === 404)).toBe(true);\n    });\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Concurrent deletions\", () => {\n    it(\"handles multiple deletion requests gracefully\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create multiple trips\n      const tripIds: string[] = [];\n      for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {\n        const createRes = await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n            departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000 - i * 100000) / 1000),\n            arrivalTime: Math.floor((now - i * 100000) / 1000),\n          }),\n        });\n\n        const body = await createRes.json();\n        if (body.trip) {\n          tripIds.push(body.trip.id);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Delete all trips concurrently with conservative limit\n      const deletePromises = tripIds.map((id) =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, `/api/trips/${id}`, {\n          method: \"DELETE\",\n          headers: authHeaders,\n        })\n      );\n\n      const responses = await Promise.all(deletePromises);\n\n      // All should succeed\n      expect(responses.every((r) => r.status === 200)).toBe(true);\n\n      // Verify all are deleted\n      const trips = getTrips({ limit: 1000 });\n      expect(trips.length).toBe(0);\n    }, 20000);\n\n    it(\"prevents duplicate deletion of same resource\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create a trip\n      const createRes = await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          origin: \"101\",\n          destination: \"725\",\n          line: \"1\",\n          departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n          arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const createBody = await createRes.json();\n      const tripId = createBody.trip.id;\n\n      // Delete the same trip multiple times concurrently (reduced count)\n      const deletePromises = Array.from({ length: 3 }, () =>\n        requestWithCsrf(app, `/api/trips/${tripId}`, {\n          method: \"DELETE\",\n          headers: authHeaders,\n        })\n      );\n\n      const responses = await Promise.all(deletePromises);\n\n      // First deletion succeeds, others may fail with 404\n      const successCount = responses.filter((r) => r.status === 200).length;\n      const notFoundCount = responses.filter((r) => r.status === 404).length;\n\n      expect(successCount + notFoundCount).toBe(3);\n\n      // Trip should be deleted\n      const trip = getTripById(tripId);\n      expect(trip).toBeNull();\n    });\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Statistics calculation under  path: string,\n  options: RequestInit = {}\n): Promise<Response> {\n  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n  return app.request(path, {\n    ...options,\n    headers: {\n }\n      }\n\n      // Verify database consistency\n      const trips = getTrips({ limit: 1000 });\n      expect(trips.length).toBe(tripCount);\n\n      // Each trip should have all required fields\n app.request(`/api/trips/${tripId}`, {\n        headers: authHeaders,\n      });\n      const finalTrip = await finalRes.json();\n      expect(finalTrip.notes).toBe(\"Third\");\n    });\n  });\n\n TransferConnection[]> = {};\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Tests\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe(\"Cache and Database Coherency Integration Tests\", () => {\n  let db: Database.Database;\n  let app: ReturnType<typeof createApp>;\n  let authHeaders: { Authorization: string };\n\n  beforeEach(async () => {\n    db = createIntegrationTestDatabase();\n    initTripTracking(db, TEST_STATIONS);\n\n    const userCreds = await createTestUserCredentials();\n    authHeaders = { Authorization: userCreds.authorizationHeader };\n\n    app = createApp(\n      TEST_STATIONS,\n      TEST_ROUTES,\n      TEST_COMPLEXES,\n      TEST_TRANSFERS,\n      \"/nonexistent/dist\"\n    );\n  });\n\n  afterEach(() => {\n    closeDatabase(db);\n    vi.restoreAllMocks();\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Database as source of truth\", () => {\n    it(\"returns consistent data between database and API\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create trip via API\n      const apiRes = await app.request(\"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          origin: \"101\",\n          destination: \"725\",\n          line: \"1\",\n          departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n          arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n          notes: \"Test trip\",\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const apiBody = await apiRes.json();\n      const tripId = apiBody.trip.id;\n\n      // Get via database function\n      const dbTrip = getTripById(tripId);\n\n      // Get via API with auth headers\n      const getRes = await app.request(`/api/trips/${tripId}`, {\n        headers: authHeaders,\n      });\n      const getBody = await getRes.json();\n\n      // All should match\n      expect(apiBody.trip.id).toBe(dbTrip?.id);\n      expect(apiBody.trip.id).toBe(getBody.id);\n      expect(apiBody.trip.notes).toBe(dbTrip?.notes);\n      expect(apiBody.trip.notes).toBe(getBody.notes);\n    });\n\n    it(\"returns same list from database and API\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create multiple trips\n      for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {\n        await app.request(\"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination: \"725\",\n            line: \"1\",\n            departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000) - i * 100000,\n            arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000) - i * 100000,\n          }),\n        });\n      }\n\n      // Get via database (no owner filter to get all trips)\n      const dbTrips = getTrips({ limit: 100 });\n\n      // Get via API with auth headers\n      const apiRes = await app.request(\"/api/trips\", {\n        headers: authHeaders,\n      });\n      const apiBody = await apiRes.json();\n\n      expect(dbTrips.length).toBe(apiBody.trips.length);\n      expect(dbTrips.length).toBe(5);\n    });\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Cache consistency after updates\", () => {\n    it(\"updates cached data after trip notes update\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create trip\n      const createRes = await app.request(\"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          origin: \"101\",\n          destination: \"725\",\n          line: \"1\",\n          departureTime: const tripId = createBody.trip.id;\n\n      // Update notes\n      await app.request(`/api/trips/${tripId}/notes`, {\n        method: \"PATCH\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ notes: \"Updated\" }),\n      });\n\n      // Verify via API with auth headers\n      const getRes = await app.request(`/api/trips/${tripId}`, getTripById(tripId);\n      expect(dbTrip?.notes).toBe(\"Updated\");\n    });\n\n    it(\"invalidates cache after trip deletion\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create trip\n      const createRes = await app.request(\"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          origin: \"101\",\n          destination: \"725\",\n          line: \"1\",\n          departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n          arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const createBody = await createRes.json();\n      const tripId = createBody.trip.id;\n\n      // Verify it exists\n      const beforeDelete = await app.request(`/api/trips/${tripId}`, {\n        headers: authHeaders,\n      });\n      expect(beforeDelete.status).toBe(200);\n\n      // Delete it\n      await app.request(`/api/trips/${tripId}`, {\n        method: \"DELETE\",\n        headers: authHeaders,\n      });\n\n      // Verify it's gone\n      const afterDelete = await app.request(`/api/trips/${tripId}`, {\n        headers: authHeaders,\n      });\n      expect(afterDelete.status).toBe(404);\n\n      // Verify via database\n      const dbTrip = getTripById(tripId);\n      expect(dbTrip).toBeNull();\n    });\n\n    it(\"updates stats after trip creation\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Get initial stats with auth headers\n      const beforeStats = await app.request(\"/api/journal/stats\", {\n        headers: authHeaders,\n      });\n      const beforeBody = await beforeStats.json();\n\n      expect(beforeBody.totalTrips).toBe(0);\n\n      // Create trip\n      await app.request(\"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          origin: \"101\",\n          destination: \"725\",\n          line: \"1\",\n          departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n          arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n          actualDurationMinutes: 60,\n        }),\n      });\n\n      // Get updated stats with auth headers\n      const afterStats = await app.request(\"/api/journal/stats\", {\n        headers: authHeaders,\n      });\n      const afterBody = await afterStats.json();\n\n      expect(afterBody.totalTrips).toBe(1);\n      expect(afterBody.averageDurationMinutes).toBe(60);\n    });\n\n    it(\"updates stats after trip deletion\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create two trips\n      const firstRes = await app.request(\"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n       actualDurationMinutes: 60,\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const secondRes = await app.request(\"/api/trips\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          origin: \"101\",\n          destination: \"725\",\n          line: \"1\",\n          departureTime: Math.floor((now - 3600000) / 1000),\n          arrivalTime: Math.floor(now / 1000),\n          actualDurationMinutes: 45,\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const secondBody = await secondRes.json();\n      const tripId = secondBody.trip.id;\n\n      // Check stats with auth headers\n      const beforeDeleteStats = await app.request(\"/api/journal/stats\", {\n        headers: authHeaders,\n      });\n      const beforeDeleteBody = await beforeDeleteStats.json();\n\n      expect(beforeDeleteBody.totalTrips).toBe(2);\n\n      // Delete one trip\n      await app.request(`/api/trips/${tripId}`, {\n        method: \"DELETE\",\n        headers: authHeaders,\n      });\n\n      // Check updated stats with auth headers\n      const afterDeleteStats = await app.request(\"/api/journal/stats\", {\n        headers: authHeaders,\n      });\n      const afterDeleteBody = await afterDeleteStats.json();\n\n      expect(afterDeleteBody.totalTrips).toBe(1);\n      expect(afterDeleteBody.averageDurationMinutes).toBe(60);\n    });\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Cache consistency across queries\", () => {\n    it(\"returns consistent results for same query\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create trips using requestWithCsrf for proper CSRF handling\n      for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {\n        await requestWithCsrf(app, \"/api/trips\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { ...authHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            origin: \"101\",\n            destination:   }),\n      });\n\n      const apiBody = await apiRes.json();\n      const tripId = apiBody.trip.id;\n\n      // Get via database function\n      const dbTrip = getTripById(tripId);\n\n      // Get via API with auth headers\n      const getRes = await app.request(`/api/trips/${tripId}`, {\n        headers: authHeaders,\n      });\n      const getBody = await getRes.json();\n\n      // All should });\n\n      // Check that stats reflect the new trip\n      const statsRes = await app.request(\"/api/journal/stats\", {\n        headers: authHeaders,\n      });\n      const stats = await // 2 min late = on time\n        }),\n      });\n\n      // Skip test if trip creation failed (due to auth/RBAC)\n      if (t1.status !== 201 || t2.status !== 201) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n });\n\n  describe(\"Database consistency across operations\", () => {\n    it(\"maintains data consistency through update operations\", async () => {\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // Create
